agenda_items.matter_name: Administrative Code - Domestic Violence Shelter-Based Program Fund
agenda_items.title: Ordinance amending the Administrative Code to change the name of the Status of Women Domestic Violence Program Fund to the Domestic Violence Shelter-Based Program Fund; revise the purpose of the Fund; establish the Mayor's Office of Housing and Community Development, or other agency designated by the Mayor, as administrator of the Fund with delegated duties; and update provisions regarding the Fund to reflect state law changes relating to fees collected by the County Clerk for the Fund.
agenda_items.action_raw: AMENDED, AN AMENDMENT OF THE WHOLE BEARING NEW TITLE
